summary: A Newsmax 'National Report' broadcast: a DHS spokeswoman in a split-screen interview explains the CBP Home self-deportation app (free flight and $1,000 exit bonus), with inset B-roll of LA protests and law enforcement lines. The transcript is a talking interview about cost savings of self-deportation. It is a recorded TV news segment with no music. Chyrons read 'DHS ENCOURAGES PAROLED MIGRANTS TO SELF-DEPORT'; NATIONAL REPORT and NEWSMAX bugs are present. The transcript references the CBP Home app, free flights, and a $1,000 exit bonus.
notable_text: Chyrons: 'DHS ENCOURAGES PAROLED MIGRANTS TO SELF-DEPORT'; NATIONAL REPORT / NEWSMAX bugs. Transcript references the CBP Home app, free flights, and a $1,000 exit bonus.
